description: This pipeline applies extended depth of focus projection to an image. The main step involves taking an image and applying the projection to maximize intensity.

c6fe2bad-a88e-4872-862d-c0cae03c72fc.name: ij1-dimensions-hyper-stacksplitter
c6fe2bad-a88e-4872-862d-c0cae03c72fc.description: Splits a hyperstack by a selected dimension into a single or multiple output slots. Multiple output slots can be utilized to split specific indices.

af87d5d2-d827-405a-80ea-ea16b61be5f7.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExtendedDepthOfFocusSobelProjection
af87d5d2-d827-405a-80ea-ea16b61be5f7.description:
Extended depth of focus projection maximizing intensity in the local sobel image.

The sigma parameter allows controlling an Gaussian blur which should smooth the altitude map.

Parameters: Image source, ByRef Image destination, Number sigma
Available for: 3D -> 2D
